name: @dszp/ringotel-lib
description: Portable, Node-free Ringotel AdminAPI toolkit: read-only JSON-RPC client (RingotelReadClient), org snapshot gather, and a generic source→org mapping engine. Runs unchanged in a Cloudflare Worker, Node, or the browser.
//publishConfig: No `provenance: true` here on purpose: it would force provenance on EVERY publish, including the manual first one that a brand-new package requires (npm can only configure trusted publishing on a package that already exists). Provenance comes from the workflow's explicit `npm publish --provenance` in CI.
//files: Globs exclude dist/**/*.map on purpose: the maps point at src/, which does not ship, so shipping them gives every consumer broken references and 20 dead files. Maps are still emitted locally for link: consumers.
